_why: Declares the capabilities this runtime exposes to Open WebUI. Matches the Open WebUI model capabilities schema. Disabling a capability prevents Open WebUI from showing irrelevant UI controls.

reasoning.why: Nemotron Ultra's extended thinking is its primary quality differentiator. Exposing the thinking block in UI allows users to verify reasoning quality. Budget max 16384 covers research and architecture tasks without exceeding Free Tier context limits.

context.why: Model supports 1M context but NIM Free Tier degrades above 65K. Warning threshold at 50K gives user advance notice before the enforcer truncates.
